SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source

Class LocalRegistryMetricsSource

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.LocalRegistryMetricsSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
MetricsSource
public class LocalRegistryMetricsSource extends Object implements MetricsSource
Default MetricsSource: the figures come from this instance's in-process MeterRegistry, via DashboardMetricsService. Correct for a single instance and for development; behind a load balancer it reflects only the node that answered, which info() declares as mode = "local", instancesReporting = 1 so the UI shows a "this instance only" badge (see the distributed-dashboard design document).

instances() always returns a single entry for this instance so the Instances tab is always visible (showing "1 of 1"), not only when a cluster source is configured.

Author:
Anand Manissery

    • info

      public SourceInfo info()

      info in interface MetricsSource

    • series

      public List<SeriesPoint> series(long windowSec)
      Description copied from interface: MetricsSource
      Trend samples for the timeline chart, newest last. windowSec <= 0 means "all retained". Local mode reads the optional in-memory ring (empty when history is disabled); Prometheus mode derives a cluster-wide, reload-surviving trend from query_range.
      Specified by:
      series in interface MetricsSource

    • instances

      public List<InstanceMetrics> instances()
      Description copied from interface: MetricsSource
      Per-instance metrics for the cluster's Instances view — one entry per reporting member, each with that member's own summary and last-seen time.

      The default returns empty (sources with no per-instance dimension — the UI then hides the tab). local always returns exactly one entry (itself). shared-store always returns at least one entry (the dashboard host itself plus any peer snapshots in the store). prometheus returns one entry per instance label.

      Specified by:
      instances in interface MetricsSource
      Returns:
      per-instance metrics; never null; at least one element in any active source

    • exceptionsByApi

      public Map<String,List<ExceptionStat>> exceptionsByApi()
      Description copied from interface: MetricsSource
      Per-failover-endpoint exception counts: endpoint name → list of (type, count), sorted by count descending. Cluster-aware sources that cannot provide per-endpoint exception breakdowns return an empty map — the UI chart is hidden when empty.
      Specified by:
      exceptionsByApi in interface MetricsSource
